chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4512 & 4513 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 22.04.2025 Mr. Gazain Z. Magsi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Under instructions learned counsel for respondent states that the impugned notices are being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that in view thereof petitions appear to have served their purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
